title: Training Composer 2
summary: Cursor's research team builds Composer 2, a code assistant starting from Kimi K2.5 (1T parameters, 32B active) with 256K context. The model undergoes coding-focused pre-training and long-horizon RL with auto-install capabilities. Cursor evaluates it using Cursor Bench, an internal benchmark of real engineer queries and large multi-file diffs.
